description: On the Cart page, the cart content never appears. The page loads but only an empty area is shown. Users do not see the cart title, empty-cart message, shop-now link, or any cart items, coupon field, or checkout button.
expectedOutcome: The Cart page shows the cart title and either the empty-cart state (with message and link to products) or the list of cart items with quantity controls, summary, coupon input, and checkout button.
hint: Check how the cart screen is wrapped. Higher-order components must render the component they wrap.
solution: The HOC withCartPage returns a wrapper that renders only an empty div structure and never renders the WrappedComponent. So the actual ShoppingCart content is never mounted. Fix: inside CartPageWrapper, render the wrapped component (e.g. return <WrappedComponent {...props} />) instead of only the empty divs.

playwrightTests.name: Cart page shows the cart content
playwrightTests.description: Navigating to /cart should display the cart header and either empty state or cart items and summary

playwrightTests.name: Cart page shows empty state or cart UI
playwrightTests.description: User sees either the empty-cart message and shop link or the cart items list and checkout area

playwrightTests.name: Cart page loads without error
playwrightTests.description: Navigating to /cart does not show a crash or error state
